creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
FreeBSD-11.0-BETA4-amd64-memstick.img on an 
HP EliteBook 8540p notebook with UEFI enabled.

Immediately after the loader, the GUI is torn. After a while there appears a torn chunk of red towards the top of the screen. 


Reference
=========

HP EliteBook 8540p Notebook PC – HP EliteBook 8540w Mobile Workstation – Maintenance and Service Guide
http://h20565.www2.hp.com/hpsc/doc/public/display?sp4ts.oid=4097214&docLocale=en_GB&docId=emr_na-c03382696


> NVIDIA N10P-NS 1GB DDR3 - NVIDIA NVS 5100
